name: RPlog_Avalyshaar_Aboard_the_Alderaan
title: Avalyshaar Aboard the Alderaan
summary: When the medical frigate Implacable docks with the NRV Alderaan to treat a crewman sickened by rancid fuel, Major Jessalyn Valios greets the arrivals and is stunned to recognize the hooded medtech as her old friend Avalyne Fedykin -- secretly the president of Caspar, traveling in disguise. After seeing the patient to the bacta tank, the two reunite warmly in the corridor, catching up on Avalyne's disbanding of the Caspian Senate, her new three-speaker government, and her hunt for the AWOL Rtufo. They are joined by the weary Captain Skeezix (Calhoun), back from a failed mission at Etti, who muses with Jessalyn about luck, survival, and the Force, prompting Jessalyn's quiet doubts about being only one of a handful of Jedi. Luke Skywalker passes through and quietly asks Jessalyn to find him later. As Avalyne's companion Kaley reports the contaminated fuel barrels will be difficult to dispose of, Jessalyn leads the two women to the crew quarters, where they meet the young musician Shenner before she departs to inform the admiral of their situation.
